zh.lifeSummary: 當Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam於大約0990年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾丹比時，他的父親Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor27歲，母親Lleuki verch Gwerystan10歲。他和Sioned Verch Rhiwallon至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1073年在英國威爾斯丹比爾享年85歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯丹比爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam于大约0990年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾丹比时，他的父亲Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor27岁，母亲Lleuki verch Gwerystan10岁。他和Sioned Verch Rhiwallon至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1073年在英国威尔斯丹比爾享年85岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯丹比爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Danish: possibly from a German noble name von Gamm from Mecklenburg (see Gamm ).
Indian (Karnataka): name of unexplained etymology found in the Koli people (a fishing community).

variants.name: Gamm
meanings: habitational name from Gamme, near Hamburg.
from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name based on an element cognate with Old High German gaman ‘joy, fun, game’.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Llywarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional, now only occasionally used: compound of the god's name Lugu- ( see Lleu ) + Old Celtic marcos ‘horse’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam was born about 0990, in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor, was 27 and his mother, Lleuki verch Gwerystan, was 10. He had at least 1 son with Sioned Verch Rhiwallon. He died about 1073, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales: Denbigh, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam est né environ 0990, à Denbigh, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lleuki verch Gwerystan, avait 10 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sioned Verch Rhiwallon. Il est décédé environ 1073, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam um 0990 in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor 27 und seine Mutter Lleuki verch Gwerystan 10. Er hatte mit Sioned Verch Rhiwallon mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1073 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam è nato il circa 0990 nel Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lleuki verch Gwerystan, aveva 10 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sioned Verch Rhiwallon. Morì circa 1073, nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gamが約0990年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアデンビグで生まれた時，父Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevorは27歳，母Lleuki verch Gwerystanは10歳であった。彼はSioned Verch Rhiwallonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1073年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで85歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam(이)가 대략 0990년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 덴비그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lleuki verch Gwerystan(은)는 10세였다. 그는 Sioned Verch Rhiwallon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1073년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lleuki verch Gwerystan, tinha 10 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sioned Verch Rhiwallon. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1073, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam родился около 0990 г. в местности денбаи, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lleuki verch Gwerystan, 10. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sioned Verch Rhiwallon. Он умер около 1073 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ednyfed ap Llywarch Gam nació aproximadamente 0990, en Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lleuki verch Gwerystan, tenía 10 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sioned Verch Rhiwallon. Murió aproximadamente 1073, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
